summary.intent: Address two Codex review findings on PR #669 in fogodev/ars-ui: (1) prevent passive combobox reopen via SyncProps, and (2) fix the listbox accessible name to use a localized message instead of an IDREF.
summary.outcome: Both fixes were implemented, regression tests written, snapshot updated, and commit 29a6abce (and a follow-up) pushed. Codex threads were replied to and resolved, and a new @codex review pass was triggered.

repo: The combobox uses a SyncProps event path that could passively reopen a user-closed popup when props update; the fix constrains SyncProps to only close or preserve open state, never re-open.

The listbox accessible name was previously wired via aria-labelledby pointing at the combobox label IDREF, but the core cannot guarantee adapters rendered Part::Label, so a dedicated localized message (listbox_label) is safer.
Snapshot tests for combobox content attrs are in crates/ars-components/src/selection/combobox/snapshots/ and must be explicitly accepted with `cargo insta accept` after intentional changes.
The repo uses `cargo llvm-cov` for coverage and `cargo insta` for snapshot testing alongside standard clippy/fmt checks.
CI runs multiple waves: formatting/clippy/snapshot checks first, then unit tests, then coverage/adapter-parity/release-verification jobs.

code.finding: SyncProps handler region; this is where the passive reopen bug lived — needed a guard to prevent re-opening a closed combobox on prop updates.
Listbox content attrs region; aria-labelledby was pointing at the combobox label IDREF here, replaced with a localized listbox_label message.
Additional SyncProps/open-plan logic reviewed during the fix; cross-referenced with lines 3970-4015 and 4460-4548 for open/close plan helpers.

workflow: Codex review is triggered by posting '@codex review' as a PR comment; progress is tracked via GitHub reactions (eyes = reviewing, +1 = approved).
Unresolved Codex threads can be polled via GraphQL reviewThreads query filtered by author login matching 'codex'.
Review threads should be replied to with a fix reference and then resolved via the resolveReviewThread GraphQL mutation in the same step.
Formatting issues from patches should be caught with `cargo fmt --check` before committing; `cargo fmt` fixes them in place.
The snapshot-reviewed label must be manually reapplied after a push that intentionally changes insta snapshots.

friction: cargo insta accept required multiple invocation attempts — first with -p flag and explicit path, then with explicit path only, before the plain `cargo insta accept` form worked.
rustfmt caught a line-wrap issue introduced by the SyncProps patch, requiring an extra fmt+rerun cycle before the commit.
The Codex polling loop ran for an extended period (multiple CI waves completed) before Codex posted its findings, requiring patience and repeated CI status checks.
open_items: A new @codex review pass was triggered after the second commit; its outcome is not captured in this transcript — may produce further findings.
CI coverage, adapter parity, and release verification jobs were still pending at the end of the transcript; their results are unknown.
The listbox_label localization message added as part of this fix should be verified across all supported locales/adapters.
